text:
[usr/src/sys/dev/qlxgb/qla_hw.c:800]: (warning) Logical disjunction always evaluates to true: EXPR != 8 || EXPR != 10.

Source code is

           if ((*tcp_opt != 0x01) || (*(tcp_opt + 1) != 0x01) ||
                (*(tcp_opt + 2) != 0x08) || (*(tcp_opt + 2) != 10)) {
